exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT O.OwnerId, SUM(OI.Quantity * OI.UnitPrice) AS total_sales FROM "Order" O JOIN OrderItem OI ON LTRIM(TRIM(O.Id), '#') = LTRIM(TRIM(OI.OrderId), '#') WHERE O.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND O.EffectiveDate < '2022-11-25' GROUP BY O.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT O.OwnerId, SUM(OI.Quantity * OI.UnitPrice) AS total_sales FROM "Order" O JOIN OrderItem OI ON LTRIM(TRIM(O.Id), '#') = LTRIM(TRIM(OI.OrderId), '#') WHERE O.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND O.EffectiveDate < '2022-11-25' GROUP BY O.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;
